user.title: Smarter Zones
user.description: Choose the climate device to manage and set global options. You'll add individual zones next, each as its own device.

data.expose_climate: Show air conditioner controls on the device
data.force_auto_fan: Force the fan into an Auto mode
data.fan_auto_suffix: Auto fan mode suffix (e.g. /Auto for Daikin)
data.auto_fan_speed: Set fan speed automatically from zone demand
data.fan_speed_modes: Fan speeds, slowest to fastest (comma-separated, optional)
data.auto_setpoint: Adjust the unit's target temperature automatically from room demand
data.auto_power_on: Automatically power the unit on from a trigger sensor

zone.title: Add a zone
zone.description: Each zone becomes its own device with a target-temperature control, a smart-control switch and an open/closed sensor. Offsets are how far the room may drift above/below target before the zone is switched.

data.name: Zone name
data.add_conditions: Add a condition (e.g. window must be closed)

condition.title: Add a condition
condition.description: The zone is only controlled automatically while every condition matches.

abort.already_configured: This climate device is already set up.

data.expose_climate: Show air conditioner controls on the device
data.force_auto_fan: Force the fan into an Auto mode
data.fan_auto_suffix: Auto fan mode suffix (e.g. /Auto for Daikin)
data.auto_fan_speed: Set fan speed automatically from zone demand
data.fan_speed_modes: Fan speeds, slowest to fastest (comma-separated, optional)
data.auto_setpoint: Adjust the unit's target temperature automatically from room demand
data.auto_power_on: Automatically power the unit on from a trigger sensor

edit_zone_details.title: Edit zone: {name}
edit_zone_details.description: Update the zone's name, switch or room sensor. Target temperature and offsets are adjusted on the zone's own controls. This zone currently has {conditions} condition(s); tick the box to replace them.

edit_condition.title: Set a condition
edit_condition.description: The zone is only controlled automatically while every condition matches.

remove_zone.title: Remove a zone
remove_zone.description: Removing a zone also removes its device and entities.

abort.no_zones: There are no zones to remove.
